scripts.kgm: wait-on tcp:127.0.0.1:7687 && concurrently --names "Django,TW,Celery,Ready" --prefix-colors "blue,magenta,green,cyan" "python -u manage.py runserver" "python -u manage.py tailwind start" "python -u -m celery -A kgm worker -l INFO --pool=solo" "npm run notify"
scripts.notify:
wait-on http://localhost:8000 && node -e "console.log('
\x1b[32m🚀 KGM APP IS READY!\x1b[0m
Access it at: \x1b[34m\x1b[4mhttp://localhost:8000\x1b[0m
')"
